title: Which categories, if any, may ever be auto-sent, and at what measured error bar?
question: Which categories, if any, may ever be auto-sent, and at what measured error bar?
resolution: Deferred to the calibration gate: the eligible whitelist is decided from `EXP-001` results with Support-Ops + Security sign-off (`DEC-004`). PH-1 proceeds with auto-send off (`CON-001`).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "OQ-001", "Question": "Which categories, if any, may ever be auto-sent, and at what measured error bar?", "Blocking?": "Yes (for PH-2; not PH-1)", "Resolution": "Deferred to the calibration gate: the eligible whitelist is decided from `EXP-001` results with Support-Ops + Security sign-off (`DEC-004`). PH-1 proceeds with auto-send off (`CON-001`).", "Status": "Accepted-open (PH-2)"}}

title: What confidence threshold and which "sensitive" categories must always escalate to a human?
question: What confidence threshold and which "sensitive" categories must always escalate to a human?
resolution: Sensitive categories from the taxonomy (`ASM-002`) always escalate; the numeric confidence threshold is calibrated in `EXP-001` (`ADR-0004`, `FR-005`).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "OQ-002", "Question": "What confidence threshold and which \"sensitive\" categories must always escalate to a human?", "Blocking?": "Yes (for routing)", "Resolution": "Sensitive categories from the taxonomy (`ASM-002`) always escalate; the numeric confidence threshold is calibrated in `EXP-001` (`ADR-0004`, `FR-005`).", "Status": "Resolved (rule) / threshold pending `EXP-001`"}}

title: What are the exact accuracy and latency targets?
question: What are the exact accuracy and latency targets?
resolution: Answered: `NFR-001` ≥ 85% top-1; `NFR-002` ≤ 30 s p95 (`ASM-005`, clarification batch).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "OQ-003", "Question": "What are the exact accuracy and latency targets?", "Blocking?": "Yes", "Resolution": "Answered: `NFR-001` ≥ 85% top-1; `NFR-002` ≤ 30 s p95 (`ASM-005`, clarification batch).", "Status": "Resolved"}}

title: How long is processed email + draft data retained, and where?
question: How long is processed email + draft data retained, and where?
resolution: Governed by the security/retention policy (`ASM-003`, `CON-002`); the agent complies, it does not set the policy.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "OQ-004", "Question": "How long is processed email + draft data retained, and where?", "Blocking?": "No (governed by policy)", "Resolution": "Governed by the security/retention policy (`ASM-003`, `CON-002`); the agent complies, it does not set the policy.", "Status": "Accepted-open (policy-owned)"}}
